svg.text: Inline SVG primitives. No external assets. Copy-paste into any wireframe.
Simplified icons for bottom navigation. Draw at 14px. Active = filled, Inactive = outlined.

g.text: 1. All icons are inline SVG primitives — no external references, no image tags
2. Use stroke-based drawing for outlines, fill-based for active/selected states
3. Standard icon size: 24×24px in wireframes. Tab bar icons: 14×14px.
4. All strokes use stroke-linecap="round" and stroke-linejoin="round" for softness
5. Place icons using group transforms: <g transform="translate(x, y)">
#424242 (Interactive) for primary icons and active states, #757575 (Secondary) for inactive, #BDBDBD for disabled

svg.text: Wireframe Icon Set — Generic Template v1.0 — 40+ inline SVG icons
